category.scope_note: Industrial electric motor comparison focused on South Korea market access, KC certification, KEMCO high-efficiency certification, and 60 Hz frequency compatibility requirements.

title.en: China-to-South Korea Industrial Motor Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国工业电动机进入韩国：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國工業電動機進入韓國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China industrial electric motor documentation against South Korea KC Mark (ECPSA), KEMCO high-efficiency certification, KS standards (IEC 60034 adopted), and 60 Hz grid compatibility requirements. CRITICAL: Chinese 50 Hz motors are not directly compatible with South Korea's 60 Hz grid.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国工业电动机文件与韩国KC标志（ECPSA）、KEMCO高效率认证、KS标准（采用IEC 60034）及60 Hz电网兼容性要求的差距对照。重要提示：中国50 Hz电机不能直接兼容韩国60 Hz电网。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國工業電動機文件與韓國KC標誌（ECPSA）、KEMCO高效率認證、KS標準（採用IEC 60034）及60 Hz電網相容性要求的差距對照。重要提示：中國50 Hz電機不能直接相容韓國60 Hz電網。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, KC conformity assessment, customs determination, energy-efficiency approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current South Korea ECPSA, KC Mark, KEMCO, KS standards, EMC, customs, and national market-surveillance requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or placing on the market. Frequency compatibility (50 Hz vs 60 Hz) must be assessed by qualified engineers.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、KC合格评定、海关裁定、能效批准或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或投放市场前应与合格专业人士核验现行韩国ECPSA、KC标志、KEMCO、KS标准、EMC、海关及市场监管要求。频率兼容性（50 Hz对比60 Hz）须由合格工程师评估。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、KC合格評定、海關裁定、能效批准或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或投放市場前應與合格專業人士核驗現行韓國ECPSA、KC標誌、KEMCO、KS標準、EMC、海關及市場監管要求。頻率相容性（50 Hz對比60 Hz）須由合格工程師評估。

answer_first.en: KC Mark mandatory under ECPSA and 60 Hz frequency incompatibility are the two critical barriers; Chinese 50 Hz motors cannot be directly sold in South Korea without design adaptation and re-certification.
answer_first.zh: KC标志（ECPSA强制要求）和60 Hz频率不兼容是两大关键障碍；中国50 Hz电机未经设计改造和重新认证，不能直接在韩国销售。
answer_first.zht: KC標誌（ECPSA強制要求）和60 Hz頻率不相容是兩大關鍵障礙；中國50 Hz電機未經設計改造和重新認證，不能直接在韓國銷售。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
